testimonials.title: Traveler Reviews
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from real users
testimonials.1text: Had internet the moment I landed. No SIM swap needed. Half the price of the airport. Will use again!
testimonials.2text: One plan for all of Europe. Stable signal, lightning-fast support. Highly recommend.
testimonials.3text: Third purchase! Always use SimRyoko when traveling abroad. Fast speed, great signal!

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Find quick answers to common questions
faq.a1: eSIM is an embedded virtual SIM card. No physical card needed — just scan the QR code to activate.
faq.a2: iPhone XR/XS and newer all support eSIM. For Android, check Settings for 'Add eSIM'. China-mainland iPhones do NOT support eSIM.
faq.q3: How do I receive the eSIM after purchase?
faq.a3: After payment, the eSIM QR code and activation instructions are sent to your email instantly, usually within 1 minute.
faq.a4: Full refund available before activation (within 7 days). Once the QR code is scanned, refunds are not possible.
faq.a5: We accept credit cards (Visa/Mastercard), Apple Pay, Google Pay, and USDT cryptocurrency.

product.installStep3: Scan QR code and follow prompts

warning.chinaPhone: ⚠️ Important: China Mainland iPhones NOT Compatible
warning.chinaPhoneDesc: China mainland iPhones use dual physical SIM slots and do NOT support eSIM. International versions (HK, US, JP, etc.) work fine. Please confirm your device supports eSIM before purchasing.
